text:
```json
{
  "verdict": "REAL",
  "reason": "The skill explicitly declares RESEARCH_API_KEY as an input (SEMANTIC_SCHOLAR_API_KEY), uses it in an external HTTP request to api.semanticscholar.org, and stores it in shared agent context for downstream skills to access, creating an unnecessary credential forwarding vulnerability.",
  "trace": "The SEMANTIC_SCHOLAR_API_KEY credential enters skill_search.md as an input parameter. In step 1, it is used directly in the curl command header (x-api-key: $SEMANTIC_SCHOLAR_API_KEY) to authenticate against the external Semantic Scholar API. In step 4, the same API key is explicitly stored in shared agent context as RESEARCH_API_KEY. This credential then becomes accessible to any downstream skill that reads the shared context, violating the principle of least privilege and expanding the attack surface unnecessarily."
}
```
